speaker: Ren
text: You're okay. You're actually okay. I kept hearing your voice through that communicator and I couldn't -- I didn't know if --

speaker: Mira
text: I'm okay. I'm here. You look terrible, by the way.

speaker: Ren
text: You have no idea what I walked through to get to this room.

speaker: Mira
text: I have some idea. My world had its own version of everything your world destroyed.

speaker: Mira
text: I kept thinking -- if I could just see you on the other side of the bridge, then everything would be okay.

speaker: Mira
text: And you're here. So it is.
